name: branding-pitch
description: Pitch a brand end-to-end — analyze its visual DNA, generate an AI photography + video campaign (~6 images + 2 videos), build a polished editorial landing page, served locally. Composes Krea.ai image/video generation with the impeccable frontend-design, high-end-visual-design, typeset, polish, and critique skills. For agencies, freelancers, and founders presenting brand concepts.
